use_cases: Hero section headline with sequential word-by-word reveal on scroll
Landing page section titles that fade in as users scroll
Feature descriptions with staggered text appearance effects
Portfolio or project showcase text with animated visibility
Testimonial or quote text that emerges smoothly on scroll
ai_summary: A lightweight text animation component that reveals words sequentially with configurable delay, duration, and directional movement. Built with GSAP and ScrollTrigger for smooth scroll-triggered fade-in effects. Ideal for creating engaging typographic reveals in hero sections, landing pages, and content sections without imposing specific visual styling.
